_meta.note: To swap a video: update videoId only. No code changes needed. resourceLink is optional per card — shown as 'Learn more →' below the video.

levels.title: Beginner
levels.subtitle: ChatGPT beyond Google
levels.description: Start using ChatGPT for real everyday tasks — not just asking questions.

cards.title: Meal plan from a receipt photo
cards.description: Upload a grocery receipt and let ChatGPT plan your meals for the week.
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: user uploading a real photo to ChatGPT and getting a structured meal plan output. No 2024 or older — ChatGPT vision UI has changed.
cards.tryItPrompt: Scan this grocery receipt photo and create a meal plan for the week using what I already have
cards.clipboardFallback: Scan this grocery receipt photo and create a meal plan for the week using what I already have

cards.title: Summarize any PDF instantly
cards.description: Drop a PDF into ChatGPT and get the key points plus smart follow-up questions.
cards.videoSearchQuery: ChatGPT summarize PDF bullet points tutorial 2025
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: actual PDF upload to ChatGPT, bullet point summary output, follow-up questions. Short demo preferred.
cards.tryItPrompt: Summarize this PDF in 3 bullet points and suggest 2 follow-up questions I should ask
cards.clipboardFallback: Summarize this PDF in 3 bullet points and suggest 2 follow-up questions I should ask

cards.title: Write the perfect email reply
cards.description: Paste an email, get a professional reply that's warm but firm — in seconds.
cards.videoSearchQuery: ChatGPT write professional email reply decline meeting 2025
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: real email being pasted, natural language instruction like 'decline this politely', clean output. No 'prompt engineering' framing.
cards.tryItPrompt: Write a professional reply to this email that's friendly but declines the meeting
cards.clipboardFallback: Write a professional reply to this email that's friendly but declines the meeting

levels.title: Intermediate
levels.subtitle: Simple AI delegation
levels.description: Hand off real tasks to Claude — files, documents, research.

cards.title: Clean up your Downloads folder
cards.description: Ask Claude to organize your files — it knows what to keep, what to trash.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Claude AI computer use Cowork file management demo 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Claude Cowork or computer use doing file/folder management autonomously. Prefer Anthropic official launch demo if available.
cards.tryItPrompt: Look at my Downloads folder and delete everything older than 30 days except PDFs
cards.clipboardFallback: Look at my Downloads folder and delete everything older than 30 days except PDFs

cards.title: Find a restaurant and book it
cards.description: Give Claude a task like a real assistant — it'll search, decide, and act.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Claude AI agent autonomous task booking web browsing 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Claude taking an agentic action on the web (not just chat). Booking, browsing, finding info autonomously.
cards.tryItPrompt: Find a well-reviewed Italian restaurant near my location and book a table for 2 tonight at 7pm
cards.clipboardFallback: Find a well-reviewed Italian restaurant near my location and book a table for 2 tonight at 7pm

cards.title: Fill in a form from receipts
cards.description: Share your receipts — Claude reads them and fills in the expense form for you.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Claude AI fill form document processing receipts 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Claude processing a document or image and producing structured form/table output. Can be any form-filling or document extraction task.
cards.tryItPrompt: Fill in this expense form using the receipts I'll share with you
cards.clipboardFallback: Fill in this expense form using the receipts I'll share with you

levels.title: Advanced
levels.subtitle: Full AI agents
levels.description: Delegate complex multi-step workflows to AI — and get polished outputs.

cards.title: Receipts → expense report
cards.description: Give Claude 5 receipts. Get back a categorized expense report in a table.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Claude Cowork expense report receipts multi-step task 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Claude handling multiple documents/receipts and producing a structured output table. Can be any multi-doc aggregation task.
cards.tryItPrompt: Take these 5 receipts, categorize them, and generate an expense report in table format
cards.clipboardFallback: Take these 5 receipts, categorize them, and generate an expense report in table format

cards.title: Research trends → build a dashboard
cards.description: Perplexity researches a topic in depth and structures it into a readable report.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Perplexity AI deep research summary report demo 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Perplexity Deep Research running a real query and producing a structured output — not just a chat answer.
cards.tryItPrompt: Research the top 3 trends in remote work for 2025 and build me a summary dashboard
cards.clipboardFallback: Research the top 3 trends in remote work for 2025 and build me a summary dashboard

cards.title: Find the best flights in a table
cards.description: Give Perplexity a travel goal — it compares options and shows you the best ones.
cards.videoSearchQuery: Perplexity AI comparison research structured output table 2025 2026
cards.videoCurationNotes: Must show: Perplexity doing a comparison task and outputting a table or structured result. Flights, hotels, products — any comparison qualifies.
cards.tryItPrompt: Find the best flights from NYC to Tokyo in April under $1200 and compare them in a table
cards.clipboardFallback: Find the best flights from NYC to Tokyo in April under $1200 and compare them in a table
